channel.title: Empty Catch
channel.description: A collection of tools, optimizations, and arguments.

item.title: Rethinking the Test Triangle
item.description: The test triangle is a useful mental model, but it's taught in a way that leads you astray.

item.title: Valgrind
item.description: A practical walkthrough of Valgrind's most useful tools — Memcheck, Callgrind, and when to reach for each one.

item.title: ReplicaDB: A First Look at Cross-Database Replication
item.description: Notes on where ReplicaDB fits, what it gets right, and where a heavier replication tool is still the better call.
